ddls:
CREATE TABLE "chromosomes" (
  "chromosome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chromosome */,
  "chromosome_name" TEXT /* Name of the chromosome */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the chromosome */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species to which the chromosome belongs */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the chromosome entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the chromosome entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chromosome_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tissues" (
  "tissue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tissue */,
  "tissue_name" TEXT /* Name of the tissue */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tissue */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species to which the tissue belongs */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tissue entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tissue entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tissue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "circrna_tissues" (
  "circrna_tissue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each CircRNA-tissue mapping */,
  "circrna_id" INTEGER /* ID of the CircRNA */,
  "tissue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tissue */,
  "expression_level" INTEGER /* Expression level of the CircRNA in the tissue */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the CircRNA-tissue mapping was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the CircRNA-tissue mapping was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("circrna_tissue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_circrna_tissues_tissue_id FOREIGN KEY ("tissue_id") REFERENCES tissues ("tissue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flags" (
  "flag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flag */,
  "flag_name" TEXT /* Name of the flag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the flag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the flag was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the flag was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "circrna_flags" (
  "circrna_flag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each CircRNA-flag mapping */,
  "circrna_id" INTEGER /* ID of the CircRNA */,
  "flag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the CircRNA-flag mapping was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the CircRNA-flag mapping was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("circrna_flag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_circrna_flags_flag_id FOREIGN KEY ("flag_id") REFERENCES flags ("flag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last activity of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "circrna_id" INTEGER /* ID of the CircRNA data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log entry was created */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality metric */,
  "circrna_id" INTEGER /* ID of the CircRNA data entry */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the quality metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the quality metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the quality metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the quality metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "circrna_id" INTEGER /* ID of the CircRNA data entry */,
  "annotation_type" TEXT /* Type of the annotation */,
  "annotation_value" TEXT /* Value of the annotation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the annotation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the annotation was last updated */,
  "annotated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the annotation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_annotated_by FOREIGN KEY ("annotated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "circrna_id" INTEGER /* ID of the CircRNA data entry the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the data file (e.g., CSV, FASTQ) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data file was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data file was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "circrna_id" INTEGER /* ID of the CircRNA data entry the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the readme file (e.g., TXT, PDF) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the readme file was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the readme file was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., active, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_circrnas" (
  "project_circrna_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project-CircRNA mapping */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "circrna_id" INTEGER /* ID of the CircRNA */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project-CircRNA mapping was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project-CircRNA mapping was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_circrna_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_circrnas_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
